instance.not_found_description: This route does not map to a known server yet, or the list has not refreshed.

players.ip_bans_hint: IP bans are independent from player names. Only backend-readable rules are shown here.

extensions.read_only_hint: View only. Install, remove, enable, and marketplace actions are out of scope here.
extensions.plugins_description: Files detected under plugins/ or plugin/.
extensions.mods_description: Files detected under mods/ or mod/.
extensions.other_description: Top-level extension-like files that are not classified as plugins or mods.
extensions.plugins_empty: No plugin files were detected in the current instance.
extensions.mods_empty: No mod files were detected in the current instance.
extensions.other_empty: No additional extension files were detected in the current instance.
extensions.no_directories_description: This instance does not currently have plugins/plugin or mods/mod directories.
extensions.empty_directories_description: Detected extension directories exist, but no files were recognized yet.

actions.players: Return to players first to continue checking status and online presence.
actions.back: Go back to the server list and switch to another instance.

extensions.description: The instance-level plugins / mods entry is reserved here for later directory summaries and extension pages.
extensions.track_workspace: Instance rail, route, and page scaffold are connected.
extensions.track_boundary: This round does not expand real plugins / mods content yet.

config.description: The instance config entry is reserved here for a future next-native config workflow.
config.track_workspace: Instance navigation, title, and context are already in place.
config.track_boundary: This route stays as a placeholder and does not provide a config editor yet.

world.description: The world entry is reserved here for future world map or world tooling.
world.track_workspace: A stable world route now exists inside instance mode.
world.track_boundary: This round keeps it as a placeholder and does not implement a real map.

next.loading_description: Fetching the list and current status.

empty.title: No servers yet
empty.description: Create a server or import an existing one to continue.
